name: translate-web-to-chinese
description: Codex plugin for translating one URL or a linked documentation tree into Simplified Chinese without requiring an API key.

interface.shortDescription: Translate one URL or a linked docs tree into Simplified Chinese
interface.longDescription: Use the Translate Web To Chinese plugin for either page-level translation or bounded site mirroring. The plugin includes a single-URL Codex SDK translator and a higher-level crawler that iterates that translator across a linked documentation graph.
defaultPrompt: Use the translation plugin to translate this page or crawl this docs site, preserve the page graph, and build a Simplified Chinese mirror.
